zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna de Montgomery於1395年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan33歲，母親Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald32歲。她和Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton至少有1個女兒。她去世於1450年在她的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna de Montgomery于1395年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan33岁，母亲Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald32岁。她和Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton至少有1个女儿。她去世于1450年在她的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna de Montgomery was born in 1395, in Scotland, her father, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, was 33 and her mother, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, was 32. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton. She died in 1450, in her hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna de Montgomery est née en 1395, à Écosse, son père, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton. Elle est décédée en 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna de Montgomery 1395 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald 32. Sie hatte mit Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna de Montgomery è nata il nel 1395 nel Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton. Morì nel 1450, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna de Montgomeryが1395年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossanは33歳，母Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonaldは32歳であった。彼女はSir George Cunningham Lord of Beltonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1450年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna de Montgomery(이)가 1395년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna de Montgomery nasceu em 1395, em Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton. Ela faleceu em 1450, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna de Montgomery родилась в 1395 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, 32. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton. Она умерла в 1450 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna de Montgomery nació en 1395, en Scotland, su papá, Sir John Montgomery Lord of Ardrossan, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes of the Isles Macdonald, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Sir George Cunningham Lord of Belton. Murió en 1450, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
